privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified and consistent across task files. The task configures a blanket purchase agreement for a fictional vendor 'SoundWave Solutions Inc.' and a test product 'Acoustic Isolation Panel'. The blanket order specifies 1000 units at $42.00 per unit, with an initial call-off of 50 units.
